// Cppcheck suppressions file
// Add suppressions in the format: [error id]:[filename]:[line]
// Or just [error id] to suppress globally
// See: https://cppcheck.sourceforge.io/manual.html#suppressions

// Boost macros not recognized by cppcheck
unknownMacro

// GoogleTest macros inside namespaces
syntaxError

// Protobuf generated code version checks
preprocessorErrorDirective

// Exclude external/third-party directories
*:*\third_party\*
*:*/third_party/*
*:*\vcpkg\*
*:*/vcpkg/*

// Exclude build directory (generated files)
*:*\build\*
*:*/build/*
